Re-Notice Of Deft Canadian National Railway Company'S Motion For Relief Pursuant To Ccp 473
Off Calendar Nov-24-2004 Continued To Dec-21-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Erin Eileen Fry, Esq., Lombardi Loper & Conant LLP (510) 433-2600 for Defendant and Moving Party Canadian National Railway Company
Roger E. Gold, Esq., Levin Simes & Kaiser LLP (415) 273-8122 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Jewell
RULING:
A R G U E D. DEFENDANT CANADIAN NATIONAL RAILWAY COMPANY'S Motion For Relief Pursuant To CCP 473 is CONTINUED to 12/21/04 in Dept. 301: Defendant Canadian National Railroad shall serve their Motion To Quash on Plaintiff on 11/24/04 and file its motion with the Court on 11/29/04; Plaintiff shall determine if discovery is needed no later than 12/01/04. If discovery is required, discovery shall be provided to Defendant no later than 12/06/04 (all discovery shall occur in San Francisco). MOTION TO QUASH is set for hearing on 12/21/04 in Dept. 301; opposition shall be filed no later than 12/15/04; reply shall be filed no later than 12/17/04. Defendant Canadian National Railway Company, by special appearance, shall participate in all proceedings. (301/AJR/DS) Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620
